holdings.infoBox: IWN is an equity ETF with a total of 1387 individual holdings. The top holdings are TTM Technologies stock at 1.29%, EchoStar at 0.97%, Hut 8 at 0.72%, Riot Platforms at 0.58%, and Coeur Mining at 0.58%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell 2000 Value ETF (IWN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 Value index. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap value stocks. The index selects value stocks from a universe of stocks ranked 1001-3000 by market-cap. IWN was launched on Jul 24, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
